description: Ever met a vampire who's obsessed with garlic bread? How about a werewolf allergic to his own fur? Welcome to the wonderfully weird world where monsters have the same problems as middle schoolers... just with a bit more magic and mayhem. FREE AUDIOBOOK INCLUDED Perfect for reluctant readers - Scan QR code to follow along - Read-aloud ready Why Kids Love This Series: The mysterious Station Master guides young readers through 10 spine-tingling adventures that blend: Snarky humor that gets them giggling Surprising heart that teaches empathy Just enough scares to feel brave (not nightmares!) From "The Phantom Pen" (where ghostwriting gets literal) to "Night of the Scarecrow" (a lonely monster's friendship quest) to "Ms. Griswald's Gauntlet" (monster hunter training gone wrong)—each tale connects through the mysterious Timeless Terminal, rewarding careful readers with hidden connections. Perfect For: Kids who've outgrown picture books but aren't ready for true horror Ages 8-12 seeking "grown-up" scary stories Short attention spans (bite-sized chapters) Campfire stories, bedtime reading, road trips Building confidence through age-appropriate scares Your Ticket Includes: 10 connected spooky stories — perfect balance of giggles and gentle scares Free audiobook — ideal for reluctant readers & bedtime read-alongs 2 bonus games — Creature Creation Station & And Then: The Game Confidence-building adventures — age-appropriate thrills, parent-approved! Families worldwide have already claimed their seats aboard the Timeless Terminal. Your young travelers will discover worlds where monsters become friends, courage conquers fear, and imagination knows no bounds. Secure your tickets NOW and embark on adventures that build courage, creativity, and confidence with every page. All aboard! Your next adventure begins tonight! Read more
